category_sources: Official GitHub README and official manual describe Lsyncd as a live syncing daemon for synchronizing local directories with remote targets.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading expands the name as 'Lsyncd -- Live Syncing (Mirror) Daemon'.
docs_sources: Official lsyncd.github.io manual includes building, invoking, config file, examples, FAQ, and developer docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official manual describes filesystem event watching, rsync/rsync+ssh synchronization, and Lua configuration; source_facts.executables lists lsyncd.
